note: Knowledge Base (growth-impl.md §7.3): validated learning as a topic graph. Learnings cite evidence experiments; confidence_prior seeds new signals on that topic; related enables adjacency (wins branch, losses prune). Seeded with prior knowledge from the 2026 market analysis; learn.mjs appends verdicts as experiments resolve.

learnings.claim: CJK word-conversion demand (转word) skews to Bing, not Google
readme→pdf is the top Google intent; /claude-artifacts-to-pdf is a Bing star (~12.5% CTR)
Markdown→image (长图) opens the WeChat 公众号 wedge for CJK
ChatGPT & Doubao send real referral traffic; AI is a distinct acquisition channel
